acceptance_targets: [CH15-PROSE-01] PASS only if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:311 all read as grammatically complete sentences in narration while preserving the same immediate scene function. FAIL if any of those targeted beats still rely on isolated noun-phrase or count-off fragments with omitted verbs.

[FBR-002] Pass if, by the time the reader reaches snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5756, Gabriel's location, recorder access, and consent to remain aboard are already legible from on-page action; fail if his role still depends on the backfilled 'He had said yes...' explanation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS only if the revised beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:311 all read as grammatically complete sentences in narration while preserving the same immediate scene function. FAIL if any of those targeted beats still rely on isolated noun-phrase or count-off fragments with omitted verbs.
findings.problem: The chapter repeatedly drops into clipped noun-phrase/count-off fragments such as "Three knots. Then four.", "Systems. Shared infrastructure.", "Strings, low and tasteful.", "Two beats. Three.", and "No nod. No signal." The recurrence makes the rhythm feel like a reusable house tic instead of earned compression, and it violates the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:53, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:107, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:121, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:265, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:311, recast the fragment beats as grammatically complete sentences still locked to Marisol's perception. Keep the abrupt impact, but restore omitted verbs/articles so the counting, systems realization, headset texture, flush delay, and Ivo handoff read as deliberate compression rather than clipped shorthand.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by the time the reader reaches snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5756, Gabriel's location, recorder access, and consent to remain aboard are already legible from on-page action; fail if his role still depends on the backfilled 'He had said yes...' explanation.
findings.problem: Chapter 15 asks the reader to accept Gabriel as already hidden behind a service cabinet and to accept his consent to the demo-coach sabotage via retrospective summary ('He had said yes'). At the exact hinge where the novel turns from temptation to public conspiracy, the action is narrated after the fact instead of dramatized, flattening suspense and weakening the sense that Gabriel chose collective exposure over private escape in scene.
findings.rewrite_direction: At the chapter opening around snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5377 and before the reveal at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:5756, add 1-2 concrete beats that orient Gabriel's clandestine presence: when he was brought back aboard, where the recorder and patch lead were concealed, and what search pressure nearly exposed him. Keep it compressed, but give it bodily risk and operational friction instead of relying on later summary.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the novel's uncomfortable overlap of sanitation, state violence, labor dependence, and family love. When an edge case appears, prefer the version that keeps physical consequence, class coercion, and emotional contradiction visible on the page rather than the version that makes characters cleaner, nobler, or easier to forgive.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene turns away at the exact moment bodily, economic, or moral consequence should become legible, revise toward specificity. Omission is only valid when residue, aftermath, and changed behavior keep the pressure fully present.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms should mark emphasis, bureaucracy, class performance, or character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate dense procedural chapters with quieter aftermath, meals, night holds, confession scenes, and dark-comic institutional theater. No two consecutive chapters should rely on the same rhythm of scene count, dialogue density, or pressure delivery; vary between confrontation, drift, revelation, ritual preparation, humiliation, public spectacle, and stillness under pressure.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, infrastructural, unsentimental, and specific about procedures without becoming jargon-drunk. Abstract thought should rise from physical consequence instead of replacing it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored primarily to Marisol's bodily labor, practical thought, and moral self-management, with any widening kept chapter-level and earned by scene design.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Let long freighted sentences carry labor process, institutional language, or accumulating sensory load; then cut to shorter, grammatically complete sentences at impact points where a body, fact, or decision can no longer be blurred.
